globalConsistencyRules: All illustrations must use a clean, flat, minimalist vector art style.
The primary color palette is professional and muted, using blues, grays, and whites, with a single bright accent color (e.g., teal) for calls-to-action and highlights.
All character portraits are from the chest-up, facing slightly towards the camera, in a consistent style.
UI elements like buttons and windows must be consistent in design, color, and typography throughout the simulation.
actionAssetRules: Every action asset must be generated on a single pure white #FFFFFF background.
Every action asset must have thin black or very dark charcoal outlines around the object silhouette and key internal edges.

priya_sharma.name: Priya Sharma
priya_sharma.sourcePersona: Priya is your manager. She is direct, efficient, and data-driven, but also a supportive coach. She's feeling pressure from leadership to increase hiring targets without a budget increase, so she needs her team to be autonomous and effective. She prefers quick check-ins and doesn't have time for hand-holding.
priya_sharma.appearancePrompt: A South Asian woman in her early 40s with a sharp, focused, and competent expression. She has dark brown hair pulled back into a sleek, professional bun, and high cheekbones. Her look is polished and conveys efficiency.
priya_sharma.wardrobePrompt: Priya consistently wears tailored blazers in solid, dark colors like navy or charcoal over simple silk shell tops. Her only accessory is a pair of minimalist gold hoop earrings.

eleanor_vance.name: Eleanor Vance
eleanor_vance.sourcePersona: Eleanor is a brilliant but impatient and traditional hiring manager. She sees recruiting as a service and gets frustrated by questions she thinks are obvious. Her team is overworked after two junior analysts quit, so she needs a new hire urgently and is skeptical that a junior recruiter can meet her high standards.
eleanor_vance.appearancePrompt: A Caucasian woman in her late 40s with a stern, serious expression and sharp features. She has an impeccably styled, short salt-and-pepper bob haircut. She wears classic, thin rectangular-framed glasses that accentuate her direct and impatient gaze.
eleanor_vance.wardrobePrompt: Eleanor's attire is traditional and formal. She favors high-collared blouses and structured sheath dresses in neutral tones like beige, cream, and grey. She always wears a single strand of pearls.

david_chen.name: David Chen
david_chen.sourcePersona: David is a collaborative, thoughtful, and tech-savvy hiring manager. He views recruiting as a true partnership and appreciates getting context and data. He is building a new data analytics sub-team and needs candidates with a very specific, niche skillset, so he needs a recruiter who can screen for potential, not just experience.
david_chen.appearancePrompt: An East Asian man in his late 30s with a warm, friendly, and approachable expression. He has a modern, short haircut and is clean-shaven. He wears stylish, dark-rimmed glasses that give him a thoughtful, tech-focused look.
david_chen.wardrobePrompt: David's style is smart-casual. He typically wears well-fitting button-down shirts, sometimes with a subtle pattern, with the top button undone and no tie. He often layers his shirts with a lightweight, dark-colored crewneck sweater.

chloe_kim.name: Chloe Kim
chloe_kim.sourcePersona: Chloe is an eager, intelligent, and well-prepared student, but she is nervous because Stratosphere is her top-choice company. She has a non-negotiable, pre-paid family trip planned for three weeks immediately after graduation and is worried it will jeopardize her chances if she brings it up too early.
chloe_kim.appearancePrompt: An East Asian woman in her early 20s with a bright, earnest, and slightly nervous expression. She has long, straight dark hair worn neatly. Her appearance is polished and professional, clearly dressed for an important interview.
chloe_kim.wardrobePrompt: Chloe wears appropriate and professional student interview attire. Her go-to outfit is a simple, well-fitting dark blazer over a light-colored, modest shell top.

player-desk-stratosphere.name: Player's Desk at Stratosphere
player-desk-stratosphere.appearancePrompt: A clean, modern, and organized workstation within a bright, open-plan corporate office. The desk is white, featuring a large monitor, a laptop on a stand, and an ergonomic chair. In the blurred background, floor-to-ceiling windows and other workstations are visible, conveying a sense of a larger, bustling consulting firm.
stableElements: Dual monitor setup (one large primary, one laptop)
A small succulent plant in a white pot

eleanor-office-vcall.name: Eleanor's Office (Video Call)
eleanor-office-vcall.appearancePrompt: The background for Eleanor's video calls, showing her private, traditional senior manager's office. The room has a formal, established feel, with dark wood bookshelves filled with leather-bound books and several framed industry awards. A large, tasteful abstract painting with blue and grey tones hangs on the wall directly behind her.

chloe-home-office-vcall.name: Chloe's Home Office (Video Call)
chloe-home-office-vcall.appearancePrompt: The background for Chloe's video calls, showing a neat and tidy corner of her student apartment, arranged to look as professional as possible. A well-organized bookshelf with university textbooks and a few personal items is visible. The wall is a neutral light gray, and the space is well-lit by a desk lamp.

reusableObjects.name: Standard Issue Laptop
reusableObjects.appearancePrompt: A generic, modern, high-end corporate laptop. It has a slim profile and a dark gray or silver metallic finish with a clean, minimalist design and no visible logo.

reusableObjects.name: Office Headset
reusableObjects.appearancePrompt: A professional, single-ear call center style headset with a thin, adjustable boom mic. It is made of black plastic and metal.

reusableObjects.name: Yellow Legal Notepad
reusableObjects.appearancePrompt: A standard yellow legal pad with blue-ruled lines. It is often shown with some scribbled, illegible notes and checkmarks to indicate use during a call or meeting.

reusableObjects.name: Resume Document Template
reusableObjects.appearancePrompt: A visually consistent template for all candidate resumes shown on screen. It has a clean, modern, single-column layout with clear sans-serif headings for 'Experience', 'Education', and 'Skills'.

reusableObjects.name: Tablet Device
reusableObjects.appearancePrompt: A modern tablet with a thin black bezel and no visible logo, similar in design to the standard laptop. Used for displaying reports and documents.
